allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); cwd=d.get\('workspace',{}\).get\('current_dir',''\); cw=d.get\('context_window',{}\); used=cw.get\('used'\); total=cw.get\('total'\); pct=cw.get\('used_percentage'\); def fmt\(n\): return f'{n/1000:.0f}k' if n<1000000 else f'{n/1000000:.1f}M'.rstrip\('0'\).rstrip\('.'\)+'M'; print\(f'{cwd} | Context: {fmt\(used\)}/{fmt\(total\)} \({pct:.0f}%\)' if used is not None and total is not None else f'{cwd} | Context: {pct:.0f}% used' if pct is not None else cwd\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); cwd=d.get\('workspace',{}\).get\('current_dir',''\); cw=d.get\('context_window',{}\); used=cw.get\('used'\); total=cw.get\('total'\); pct=cw.get\('used_percentage'\); fmt=lambda n: \(f'{n/1000:.0f}k' if n<1000000 else f'{n/1000000:.1f}M'.rstrip\('0'\).rstrip\('.'\)+'M'\); print\(f'{cwd} | Context: {fmt\(used\)}/{fmt\(total\)} \({pct:.0f}%\)' if used is not None and total is not None else f'{cwd} | Context: {pct:.0f}% used' if pct is not None else cwd\)")
